testcase.name: test_consequence_tags_applied

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert [] == ['escalation_...igh_pressure']
Right contains 2 more items, first extra item: 'escalation_path'
Full diff: + [] - [ - 'escalation_path', - 'high_pressure', - ]

testcase.failure: tests\branching\test_branching_turn_executor.py:275: in test_consequence_tags_applied assert result.consequence_tags == ["escalation_path", "high_pressure"] E AssertionError: assert [] == ['escalation_...igh_pressure'] E E Right contains 2 more items, first extra item: 'escalation_path' E E Full diff: E + [] E - [ E - 'escalation_path', E - 'high_pressure', E - ]

testcase.name: test_decision_point_render_seam

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'path_a' in [] + where [] = BranchingTurnResult(success=True, new_turn_number=1, state_delta={'action_executed': 'decide', 'turn_number': 0}, error_message=None, executed_at=datetime.datetime(2026, 4, 23, 14, 7, 25, 779321, tzinfo=datetime.timezone.utc), decision_point_id=None, chosen_option_id=None, consequence_tags=[], path_signature='e3b0c44298fc1c14').consequence_tags

testcase.failure: tests\branching\test_branching_turn_executor.py:318: in test_decision_point_render_seam assert "path_a" in result.consequence_tags E AssertionError: assert 'path_a' in [] E + where [] = BranchingTurnResult(success=True, new_turn_number=1, state_delta={'action_executed': 'decide', 'turn_number': 0}, error_message=None, executed_at=datetime.datetime(2026, 4, 23, 14, 7, 25, 779321, tzinfo=datetime.timezone.utc), decision_point_id=None, chosen_option_id=None, consequence_tags=[], path_signature='e3b0c44298fc1c14').consequence_tags

testcase.name: test_scenario_c_decision_definitions
testcase.failure: tests\branching\test_evaluation_cycle.py:139: in test_scenario_c_decision_definitions all_decisions = registry.get_all_decisions() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'DecisionPointRegistry' object has no attribute 'get_all_decisions'

testcase.name: test_simulate_evaluation_session_path_a

failure.message: AssertionError: assert None == 'escalate' + where None = BranchingTurnResult(success=True, new_turn_number=1, state_delta={'action_executed': 'decide', 'turn_number': 0}, error_message=None, executed_at=datetime.datetime(2026, 4, 23, 14, 7, 27, 137399, tzinfo=datetime.timezone.utc), decision_point_id=None, chosen_option_id=None, consequence_tags=[], path_signature='e3b0c44298fc1c14').chosen_option_id

testcase.name: test_evaluation_report_with_divergence
testcase.failure: tests\branching\test_evaluation_cycle.py:403: in test_evaluation_report_with_divergence assert 78 < overall < 82 # Weighted average around 80 ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E assert 78 < 0.0
